title: 10 Godly Habits of a Man Who Governs Himself
caption:
The man who governs himself isn't impressive in public. He's just consistent in private.

The 2 AM phone. The excuse after failure. The second piece. The sharp word when he's tired. None of those feel like a big deal in the moment. Stacked up over a year, they're either a man being formed or a man being run.

This is what the governed man looks like in ordinary hours. Not a monk. A man with a practice.

"A man without self-control is like a city broken into and left without walls." — Proverbs 25:28

Save this and pick two.

#faith #selfdiscipline #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #thework #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
